THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CAPITAL INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DILLARD, ALAN RANDOLPH $3,732.57 PRINCIPAL, $525.58 INTEREST, $153.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,411.65
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT BY COURT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CAPITAL INSURANCE COMPANY
